1.name: Annie
1.notes: R Tibbers = AoE stun on cast (hard-aoe). Q/W stun on every 4th spell.

2.name: Olaf
2.notes: Q ranged axe slow = soft-single. No dashes (R is fearless steroid). Low mobility per strict count.

3.name: Galio
3.notes: R global taunt + knockup landing = hard-aoe initiation. E charge AoE knockup. R global = blink override (rule B).

4.name: Twisted Fate
4.notes: W gold card single-target stun. R global teleport = blink override (rule B).

5.name: Xin Zhao
5.notes: E dash + W3 knockup = soft-single. R AoE pushback = disengage knockback.

6.name: Urgot
6.notes: E leap = AoE knockflip (hard-aoe). AA range 350 = ranged-short bucket. R single-target execute lock.

7.name: LeBlanc
7.notes: W double dash + E chain root + R clone duplicate = high mobility + iconic pick signature.

8.name: Vladimir
8.notes: W pool = self-untargetable but not a dash per strict rule B. Item-stacking late hyper-scaler.

9.name: Fiddlesticks
9.notes: R global teleport AoE fear = hard-aoe initiation. Q single-target fear can also peel chasers.

10.name: Kayle
10.notes: Becomes ranged at level 6 (525-625). E ranged AA. R single-target invulnerability for ally = strong peel. Hyper late scaler.

11.name: Master Yi
11.notes: Q alpha-strike untargetable = blink-equivalent. R speed buff. No CC initiation.

12.name: Alistar
12.notes: Q AoE knockup + W single-target knockback = headbutt-pulverize combo. Tank itemization but iconic AP-scaling kit.

13.name: Ryze
13.notes: W single-target root. R Realm Warp = team teleport zone (utility, not personal dash). Iconic split-pusher with global mobility.

14.name: Sion
14.notes: Late-game tank scaling (huge HP/AD via passive minion stacks), but functional role is frontline initiator, not 1v9 carry. Q charged AoE knockup. R AoE charge engage.

15.name: Sivir
15.notes: E spell shield blocks single CC = peel. R team movespeed = utility (not initiation CC).

16.name: Soraka
16.notes: E single-target root post-delay. W heal + R global heal = iconic protect signature.

17.name: Teemo
17.notes: W on-hit poison adds AD secondary. Q blind = peel single-target. R mushrooms are traps (not peel per rule D). Split signature.

18.name: Tristana
18.notes: Range stays ranged-short per arbitration (matches 525 base; level scaling not overridden). R = knockback on enemy → disengage knockback (also dual-purpose for engage but rule C = no flag). W = 1 dash → medium per strict count rule B.

19.name: Warwick
19.notes: R global leap + suppress single target = soft-single engage. R global = 1 blink (rule B).

20.name: Nunu & Willump
20.notes: W consume gap-close on champions = 1 dash. R AoE ground but slow channel, not initiation.

21.name: Miss Fortune
21.notes: R Bullet Time = AoE channeled finisher (alignment-dependent, not initiation). No CC engage tool.

22.name: Ashe
22.notes: AA range 600 → ranged-long bucket. R global single-target stun = soft-single engage (iconic global pick). W cone slow does not knockback.

23.name: Tryndamere
23.notes: E spin = gap close + slow on path = soft-single. R undying 5s = self-survival, not disengage tool.

24.name: Jax
24.notes: Q gap-close + E counterstrike (small AoE stun on activation). Late-game scaling bruiser hyperCarry.

25.name: Morgana
25.notes: Q binding = long-range single-target root (iconic pick). E magic shield single-target peel. R Soul Shackles = AoE follow-up (not primary initiation).

26.name: Zilean
26.notes: Q+W double-bomb = single-target stun. E speed buff utility. R revive = ultimate peel.

27.name: Singed
27.notes: E toss flips single enemy = knockback (engage AND disengage dual-purpose, rule C no flag). Q poison trail not CC.

28.name: Evelynn
28.notes: E charm-stun second cast. R blink + execute. Passive stealth not counted as dash.

29.name: Twitch
29.notes: AA range 300 (lowest of marksmen) = ranged-short bucket. Q stealth + R extended-range AA. No dashes, no CC.

30.name: Karthus
30.notes: Range override per rule A (artillery mage, Q 875). R global execute. Hyper late scaler with passive ghost-form.

31.name: Cho'Gath
31.notes: Q delayed AoE knockup (typically lands on 1) = soft-single. R single-target true-damage execute.

32.name: Amumu
32.notes: R AoE root (Curse of the Sad Mummy) = textbook hard-aoe initiation. Q hookshot bandage = 1 dash.

33.name: Rammus
33.notes: R AoE earth taunt = hard-aoe. Q powerball = ramping speed gap-close (counts as 1 dash for medium per rule B).

34.name: Anivia
34.notes: AA range 600 = ranged-long bucket. Q delayed long-range stun. W ice wall = iconic positional peel.

35.name: Shaco
35.notes: Q stealth dash = soft-single pick tool. W boxes AP-scaled (secondary). R clone.

36.name: Dr. Mundo
36.notes: Q ranged single-target slow = soft engage. R heal-scaling hyperCarry late.

37.name: Sona
37.notes: R Crescendo = AoE line stun (iconic engage). Auras + W heal = peel. Pure enchanter scaling.

38.name: Kassadin
38.notes: R chained blink (CD scales with rank) = high mobility + late hyper. W on-hit silence = peel.

39.name: Irelia
39.notes: Q resets on minion/champion kills (multiple dashes). E line stun two-part placement.

40.name: Janna
40.notes: Q tornado = knockup (peel + knockback), R = AoE knockback. No dashes/blinks → low per strict count rule B (movespeed-flavor mobility from passive + W is not counted).

41.name: Gangplank
41.notes: Q single-target poke. R global AoE damage zones = utility, not initiation. Barrels = active hazards (not peel per rule D).

42.name: Corki
42.notes: AD basic + magic-on-hit passive. W Valkyrie = 1 dash. Q/R abilities AP scaling secondary.

43.name: Karma
43.notes: RW tether root = peel. RQ AoE root long-range = soft-single setup. RE shield + speed peel.

44.name: Taric
44.notes: E ranged stun via 2-link with ally. W dash to ally + shield. R AoE invulnerability = ultimate peel.

45.name: Veigar
45.notes: engageTool soft-single per arbitration (typical use locks 1 target despite cage AoE potential). Cage walls also peel chasers → disengageTools=['peel']. R is execute, not engage. Infinite Q stacks → hyperCarry.

48.name: Trundle
48.notes: E pillar = positional peel/zone control. R single-target steroid + slow. No dashes. Iconic split-pusher.

50.name: Swain
50.notes: W long-range AoE root delayed = hard-aoe. R drain AoE for sustain in fights. E pull = single peel/engage.

51.name: Caitlyn
51.notes: W trap not counted as peel per rule D (trap requires enemy commit, not reactive). E net = self-knockback (mobility), enemy slow only. No team disengage.

53.name: Blitzcrank
53.notes: Q hook = single-target gap-close pull. E AoE silence + knockup on next AA = knockback disengage. Iconic pick signature.

54.name: Malphite
54.notes: AD primary (tank-AD canonical build). AP build with R full-AP exists but secondary. R = textbook hard-aoe initiation. 1 dash (R) = medium per strict count rule B.

55.name: Katarina
55.notes: Primary AP (Q/W/E/R AP scaling). E reset on dagger pickup = high mobility. R AoE channeled execute combo.

56.name: Nocturne
56.notes: R global blink = pick tool. W spell-shield = single-ally peel. R global = 1 blink (rule B medium).

57.name: Maokai
57.notes: R Nature's Grasp = AoE root wave (iconic engage). W underbrush short-blink to enemy = 1 dash. Saplings + Q knockback also peel.

58.name: Renekton
58.notes: E double-dash (with empowered Q reset on stun). 2+ dashes → high. Early-game lane bully.

59.name: Jarvan IV
59.notes: EQ flag-drag knockup combo + R Cataclysm AoE arena (drops walls around enemy). Multi-dash mobility.

60.name: Elise
60.notes: Human E = single-target stun cocoon. Spider rappel = blink. Multiple dashes.

61.name: Orianna
61.notes: R Command: Shockwave = AoE pull-knockup at ball location (iconic team-fight engage). E shield single peel.

62.name: Wukong
62.notes: R Cyclone = AoE spinning knockup (iconic hard-aoe). E gap-close + slow. R disengage knockback dual-purpose (rule C).

63.name: Brand
63.notes: Q stun on ablazed targets = soft-single. R bouncing damage = AoE finisher (not initiation).

64.name: Lee Sin
64.notes: Q1+Q2 = soft-single gap-close + slow. R = single-target knockback (dual-purpose engage/disengage; per rule C, tagged knockback only). Q2 + W2 = 2 dashes → high per strict count.

67.name: Vayne
67.notes: E condemn = knockback (stun on wall = bonus). W silver bolts = true damage as kit detail (primary AD AA). Q tumble = 1 dash → medium per strict count; R adds stealth + speed (not a dash).

68.name: Rumble
68.notes: E electro-harpoon double-cast slow + stun stack on second hit = soft-single. R = AoE damage line (zone control, not direct CC initiation).

69.name: Cassiopeia
69.notes: Range override per rule A (artillery-mage pattern): AA 550 → bucket short, but kit reach 825 (Q/R) and primary play is long-range poke/control → ranged-long. R = conditional cone stun, requires close + facing — not initiation. W ground = peel (slow zone protects retreat).

72.name: Skarner
72.notes: Reworked Skarner: R single-target suppress drag = soft-single. E grab terrain = mobility tool (1 dash equivalent).

74.name: Heimerdinger
74.notes: Range override per rule A (artillery mage). E grenade stun = single-target precise (135 stun radius vs 250 damage radius). R upgraded grenade can multi-stun via 3 bounces but conditional/situational. Turrets = zone control = peel (active deployable, not passive trap).

75.name: Nasus
75.notes: W ranged single-target slow + autoreduce = soft-single. Q infinite stacking → hyperCarry late.

76.name: Nidalee
76.notes: Cougar-form W pounces (multi-dash). Q javelin damage AP. No CC initiation. Form-switch champion.

77.name: Udyr
77.notes: R wolf-stance leap stun = soft-single. E bear-stun on AA. Multiple stance speed/dash effects.

78.name: Poppy
78.notes: R Keeper's Verdict = charged AoE knockup line (iconic disengage/engage). W gap-close stun on wall hit = single.

79.name: Gragas
79.notes: R explosive cask = AoE knockback line (dual engage/disengage, rule C tagged knockback). E body slam = 1 dash.

80.name: Pantheon
80.notes: W gap-close stun. R global jump = blink (rule B medium). Early-game lane bully.

81.name: Ezreal
81.notes: AA range 550 → ranged-short. Q arcane shift skillshot poke at 1150 not enough to override rule A (positioned ADC, not artillery mage). E arcane shift = 1 dash.

82.name: Mordekaiser
82.notes: R Realm of Death = single-target 1v1 banishment (iconic pick/split). E pull single. No dashes.

83.name: Yorick
83.notes: E ghoul mark slow + ghoul swarm = soft-single. No dashes. Iconic split-pusher with maiden.

84.name: Akali
84.notes: Pure AP scaling (Q + R core). AD passive on AA is procs-only, not build-defining in pro. E dash + R double blink = high mobility pick.

85.name: Kennen
85.notes: R Slicing Maelstrom = AoE storm stun via mark stacks (iconic teamfight engage). E lightning rush dash.

86.name: Garen
86.notes: Q decisive strike = silence + speed gap-close (silence = soft CC). E spin damage. R single-target true execute.

89.name: Leona
89.notes: R Solar Flare = long-range AoE stun (iconic hard-aoe engage). E gap-close stun. Q passive AA stun.

90.name: Malzahar
90.notes: R single-target suppress (iconic pick) = soft-single. Q silence + W voidlings = peel utility.

91.name: Talon
91.notes: E parkour wall vault + Q dash silence + R stealth = high mobility pick assassin.

92.name: Riven
92.notes: Q3 small-AoE knockup. E dash + shield. R recast extends mobility. Multi-dash bruiser.

96.name: Kog'Maw
96.notes: AD primary (on-hit build dominates pro), AP secondary via R/E/Q + W % HP magic. Confidence medium because secondary weight is patch-dependent. Range 500 = short bucket; W active extends to ~700 (not overridden — base bucket retained).

98.name: Shen
98.notes: E dash + AoE taunt cone = hard-aoe. W AoE damage block = peel. R global ally shield = ultimate peel.

99.name: Lux
99.notes: Range override per rule A (artillery mage, Q 1100, E 1100). Q binding root single-target. E shield + AoE damage.

101.name: Xerath
101.notes: Range override per rule A (artillery mage extreme, Q 1500, R global). E stun line.

102.name: Shyvana
102.notes: R dragon-form leap = AoE damage zone but reliable stun is on impact target (single). Knockback disengage on collateral. Form: dragon (R active).

103.name: Ahri
103.notes: E charm = single-target soft CC (iconic pick). R triple dash = high mobility. E charm chasers = peel.

104.name: Graves
104.notes: AA range 425 = ranged-short. E dash gap-close (no CC). Shotgun bursty mid-game.

105.name: Fizz
105.notes: R fish line knockup with potential AoE secondary. E pole-vault untargetable + Q dash. Multi-dash assassin.

106.name: Volibear
106.notes: Q stun on dash second hit. R global tower-leap knockback near towers. R global = 1 blink.

107.name: Rengar
107.notes: R camouflage + leap from bushes = pick assassin signature. Bushjump leap counts as multiple effective dashes.

110.name: Varus
110.notes: AA 575 → ranged-long bucket. R chain root = soft-single (multi-target if blight chain spreads). On-hit AD or lethality builds.

111.name: Nautilus
111.notes: Q dredge line hookshot = single-target gap-close pull. R single-target lock-on stun/jump. W passive AA root.

112.name: Viktor
112.notes: W Gravity Field = delayed AoE stun zone (hard-aoe). E death ray line. R AoE damage.

113.name: Sejuani
113.notes: R Glacial Prison = AoE line stun (iconic hard-aoe). Q dash = 1 mobility. Frost passive proc stun.

114.name: Fiora
114.notes: Q resets on crit but counts as 1 dash → medium per strict rule B. W parry = reactive CC (not engage initiation). Iconic split-pusher signature.

115.name: Ziggs
115.notes: Range override per rule A (artillery mage, Q 850). W satchel charge = AoE knockback. E mine field. Iconic siege signature.

117.name: Lulu
117.notes: W polymorph = single-target hard CC, used as peel per rule D (active reactive). R = AoE knockup + ally shield → peel + knockback. No dashes.

119.name: Draven
119.notes: AA range 550 = short bucket. E small-knockaside cone = knockback peel. No dashes. Early-game snowballer.

120.name: Hecarim
120.notes: Mobility = high per documented override of rule B: E = ramp-speed charge (not a strict dash but kit-defining mobility), R = line dash. Engage hard-aoe via R fear-line.

121.name: Kha'Zix
121.notes: E leap reset on takedowns. W single-target slow. Iconic pick assassin.

122.name: Darius
122.notes: E single-target pull (slow + gap close to him). R single-target true execute. No personal dashes.

126.name: Jayce
126.notes: Dual-form. Tagged on cannon (poke/siege) form as primary playstyle. Hammer E = small-AoE knockback → soft-single engage + knockback disengage (rule C: no flag). Cannon E acceleration gate = damage + light self-mobility. Siege signature.

127.name: Lissandra
127.notes: W AoE small-area root + R-self AoE root = hard-aoe (R-on-self). R-on-enemy = single-target stasis. E dash.

131.name: Diana
131.notes: R chain dashes between marked enemies = high mobility + multi-strike. Q crescent slash + W shield.

133.name: Quinn
133.notes: E vault knockup gap-close = soft-single. R Behind Enemy Lines = global movement utility. Split signature.

134.name: Syndra
134.notes: E push knockback line via orbs = soft-single + disengage knockback. R orb finisher single-target.

136.name: Aurelion Sol
136.notes: Range override per rule A (post-rework artillery mage). R = long line pull then AoE knockup (hard-aoe). Infinite stack scaling = hyperCarry.

141.name: Kayn
141.notes: E wall traversal + R untargetable+stun = high mobility pick. Form-switch (Rhaast/Shadow) doesn't change tags.

142.name: Zoe
142.notes: E bubble single-target sleep (iconic pick). W summoner spell = utility teleport (not strict dash).

143.name: Zyra
143.notes: AA 575 → ranged-long. E single-target snare-root. R AoE delayed knockup.

145.name: Kai'Sa
145.notes: Hybrid AD on-hit + AP magic via W/E/passive plasma. E dash + R blink = high mobility marksman.

147.name: Seraphine
147.notes: R Encore = thin AoE charm wave that extends through champions hit (long-range hard-aoe). E stun on 2-stack proc.

150.name: Gnar
150.notes: Mini Gnar AA range 400 → ranged-short bucket primary. Mega Gnar = melee form. R AoE line knockback into wall = hard-aoe.

154.name: Zac
154.notes: E charged jump AoE knockup (iconic hard-aoe). R bouncing slow + AoE knockup. Multi-jump mobility.

157.name: Yasuo
157.notes: Q3 small-AoE knockup. E dashes through enemies/minions (multi-dash high). W windwall = projectile-block peel.

161.name: Vel'Koz
161.notes: Range override per rule A (artillery mage, Q 1100, R 1500). E tectonic disruption knockup.

163.name: Taliyah
163.notes: W AoE knockback ground = hard-aoe. R wall ride = global movement utility (medium mobility per kit feel, override rule B).

164.name: Camille
164.notes: R isolates single target in arena. E hookshot stun on wall (gap close). Q reset + W heal/speed = high mobility split.

166.name: Akshan
166.notes: E grappling hook reusable + W stealth on bush/wall = high mobility pick-leaning marksman.

200.name: Bel'Veth
200.notes: Q dash + W charge stun (line). Q resets on takedowns. Stacks-based scaling skirmisher.

201.name: Braum
201.notes: Q ranged ice slow → 4-stack proc stun = soft-single engage. E Unbreakable shield wall blocks projectiles = peel. R AoE line knockup = knockback. W jump-to-ally = 1 dash.

202.name: Jhin
202.notes: AA 550 base = short bucket boundary; tagged ranged-long for kit feel (passive scales range, R global). W single-target root via marker = soft-single + peel.

203.name: Kindred
203.notes: E mark damage + W zone slow. R AoE no-death zone = ultimate peel. Q hop = 1 dash.

221.name: Zeri
221.notes: E dash + slow. R passive enhanced movement. Wall hop interactions. High mobility marksman.

222.name: Jinx
222.notes: AA 525 base = short bucket. Q rocket-form extends range during active. E Flame Chompers = trap (not peel per rule D). Iconic ADC hyperCarry.

223.name: Tahm Kench
223.notes: Q stun line on stacks. W swallow ally to safety = unique peel. R global team transport = utility (not personal dash).

233.name: Briar
233.notes: Released Sep 2023. R global frenzy = self-buff + dash to random/hit target — uncontrolled chase, not a coordinated team-engage tool. W frenzy lock-on. Multi-mobility skirmisher.

234.name: Viego
234.notes: E spectral maw = dash with stun on first hit. Q reset on AAs. Possess on takedowns. Multi-dash assassin/skirmisher.

235.name: Senna
235.notes: AA 600 base + infinite range scaling via souls = ranged-long. W single-target root = peel. AP secondary on Q/W/E/R.

236.name: Lucian
236.notes: E dash gap-close (no CC). Lane-bully marksman, mid-game spike.

238.name: Zed
238.notes: W shadow swap dash + R blink to enemy + swap. Iconic pick assassin. R = single-target lock with mark execute.

240.name: Kled
240.notes: R Chaaaaaaaarge!!! = global team-line speed boost + landing AoE knockup = hard-aoe team-engage tool.

245.name: Ekko
245.notes: W delayed AoE stun zone = hard-aoe (typical multi-target on engage). E dash + R rewind blink. R also peels self.

246.name: Qiyana
246.notes: E dash + R element-empowered stun line vs wall. Multi-element kit, multi-dash assassin.

254.name: Vi
254.notes: Q charged dash = AoE knockup line through enemies = hard-aoe. R single-target lock + knock-aside on collision.

266.name: Aatrox
266.notes: Q3 knockup = soft-single reliable initiation. E dash + Q gap-close. No team peel/knockback.

267.name: Nami
267.notes: Q bubble = single-target stun (delay). R Tidal Wave = AoE knockup line = knockback. W bouncing wave heal = peel.

268.name: Azir
268.notes: Range override per rule A (soldiers extend AA range to 700+). R Emperor's Divide = AoE knockback wall. W teleport-to-soldier = 1 dash.

350.name: Yuumi
350.notes: W attach to ally = unique movement (medium per override rule B, not strict dash). R AoE root = peel. Pure protect signature.

360.name: Samira
360.notes: E dash to ally/enemy. W windwall = peel projectile-block. R AoE damage spam. No CC initiation.

412.name: Thresh
412.notes: Q hook = single-target gap-close pull (iconic pick). E flay = small-cone knockback. W lantern dash to ally = 1 dash.

420.name: Illaoi
420.notes: E reveals soul of target (single-target slow + damage) = soft-single. Q tentacle smashes are AoE damage but no CC.

421.name: Rek'Sai
421.notes: E unburrow knockup single-target. W tunnel + R global return = multi-mobility.

427.name: Ivern
427.notes: Q line root single-target. E shield + speed for ally = peel. Daisy R = pet engage tool.

429.name: Kalista
429.notes: R Fate's Call = ally-launch knockup (enables ally engage). Passive jump-on-AA = positional mobility.

432.name: Bard
432.notes: Q ranged stun if pinned to wall = soft-single. R global stasis utility (zone control = peel). E walls = positioning peel.

497.name: Rakan
497.notes: W charge AoE knockup. R AoE charm fly-through. E dash to ally. 3+ dashes = high mobility engage support.

498.name: Xayah
498.notes: E feathers pull-back rooting enemies in line = peel. R untargetable dash + feather damage.

516.name: Ornn
516.notes: R global ram + AoE knockup on second proc = hard-aoe. E AoE forge knockup on AAs. No dashes.

517.name: Sylas
517.notes: E chain hook stun double-dash. R steals enemy ult. Multi-dash bruiser-mage.

518.name: Neeko
518.notes: R Pop Blossom = AoE delayed stun on landing (iconic hard-aoe). E line root tether.

523.name: Aphelios
523.notes: 5-weapon rotation (Calibrum/Severum/Gravitum/Infernum/Crescendum). Engage minimal. Range varies by weapon (typically short bucket).

526.name: Rell
526.notes: W mount-up gap-close into AoE stun. Q AoE knockup forward. Iconic engage support.

555.name: Pyke
555.notes: Q hook + E dash stun = soft-single pick. W stealth movespeed (not dash). 1 dash via E = medium.

711.name: Vex
711.notes: R Shadow Surge = single-target hunt-down with dash to target (refunds on takedown). Q passive Mark of the Harbinger. Not an AoE lock.

777.name: Yone
777.notes: R Fate Sealed = line knockup + dash through (iconic hard-aoe). Q3 knockup gap close. E phase dash.

799.name: Ambessa
799.notes: Released Nov 2024. Passive: dash after every ability. R single-target blink + suppress. Multi-dash skirmisher.

800.name: Mel
800.notes: Range override per rule A (artillery mage style, similar Hwei/Xerath). W Rebuttal = 1s barrier reflecting projectiles back to caster (peel via projectile block + reflect). Verified via web search 2026-05-01.

804.name: Yunara
804.notes: Released Jul 2025 (post-cutoff). Verified via web search 2026-05-01. Hybrid AD-on-hit/AP. Primary build pro 2025-2026 = Lethal Tempo + Kraken Slayer (AD). Magic damage via on-hit passive and crit empower. Retag if meta shifts AP-burst dominant. Form-swap via R-empowered W/E.

875.name: Sett
875.notes: R Show Stopper = grab single target + AoE damage on slam (CC is single-target, AoE is damage only). W facebreaker single-target stun. E grit grab single-target.

876.name: Lillia
876.notes: R Lilting Lullaby = global delayed sleep that requires Q wake to trigger damage burst. Differred conditional engage, not AoE lock. E peel disengage.

887.name: Gwen
887.notes: E dash multi-charge (counts as 1 effective dash per cast cluster). W mist self-protection. Split-pusher with anti-AA mist.

888.name: Renata Glasc
888.notes: E launches ally pushing enemies = knockback. R Hostile Takeover = AoE berserk fear = peel. W revive utility.

893.name: Aurora
893.notes: Released Aug 2024. R creates banishment zone = AoE root/banish multiple = hard-aoe. E spirit dash + W spirit-bomb root.

895.name: Nilah
895.notes: R Apotheosis = AoE pull toward Nilah = iconic hard-aoe (only melee marksman). E dash to enemy + W invincibility dodge.

897.name: K'Sante
897.notes: Q3 knockup + W shielded charge knockup + R AoE knockback on path → hard-aoe stack. W charge + E ally-dash = 2 mobility tools → high per strict count rule B. R chunks single target + line-knockbacks others.

901.name: Smolder
901.notes: Released Jan 2024. Q stack-builder, true damage at 225 stacks → hyperCarry. E leap with damage = 1 dash. R global+local AoE damage.

902.name: Milio
902.notes: Q delayed AoE root + small knockup. R AoE cleanse + heal = ultimate peel. Pure enchanter.

904.name: Zaahen
904.notes: Released Nov 2025 (patch 25.23). Verified via web search 2026-05-01. W Dreaded Return = projectile pulling all hit enemies + brief stun (multi-target hard-aoe). E + R Grim Deliverance = AoE flight slam team-engage. Passive resurrection.

910.name: Hwei
910.notes: Released Dec 2023. Range override per rule A (artillery mage, kit reach 1100+). Q3 paint root single. W2 fear AoE = peel. Multiple sub-spells per ability.

950.name: Naafiri
950.notes: Released Jul 2023. R dog packs + dashes = soft-single + multi-dash pick. E dash to enemy = single-target gap-close.
